name: handoff
description: Hand off interactive build/review tasks to six providers, plus a strict machine API: coordinator-bound Codex and sandboxed Grok for all roles, Kiro v1 for review/verify only. Prompt bytes stay off argv and every machine result fails closed with Git evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate build & review to Codex, Grok, Kiro, Claude, opencode, or Cursor
interface.longDescription: Hand off one bounded interactive build or review to another one-shot coding agent, or invoke the strict v0.2 machine ABI. Codex requires coordinator-bound AGENTS.md injection, Grok supports every role under named sandboxes, and Kiro v1 is review/verify-only. Prompt bytes stay off argv and normalized results carry deterministic Git evidence.
defaultPrompt: Have Codex review the diff in src/auth
Let Grok build the parser in src/parse.ts
Have Claude review this module, read-only
